member.summary: Carries accrual staging ref data.

member.summary: Carries accrual staging ref data.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.AisConstants
member.summary: Centralizes magic numbers/strings used across AIS payload generation and FSCM interactions. Keep values stable to avoid breaking external contracts.

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.AisConstants.Delta.PriceComparisonTolerance
member.summary: Tolerance used for price comparisons in delta calculation.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.FscmProjectStatus
member.summary: FSCM Project status codes used by AIS when updating subprojects.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.AccountingPeriodSnapshot
member.summary: Represents the accounting period context required for reversal dating rules.
Represents the accounting period context required for reversal dating rules.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.DeltaCalculationResult
member.summary: Carries delta calculation result data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.DeltaCalculationResult.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.DeltaDecision,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.DeltaPlannedLine},System.String)
member.summary: Carries delta calculation result data.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.DeltaDecision
member.summary: Defines delta decision values.

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.DeltaDecision.QuantityDelta
member.summary: Quantity-only delta line.

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.DeltaDecision.ReverseAndRecreate
member.summary: Reverse all history, then add a positive line with updated attributes.

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.DeltaDecision.ReverseOnly
member.summary: Reverse all history only (inactive scenario).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.DeltaPlannedLine
member.summary: Normalized planned journal line produced by delta engine. Later, payload builder maps this into WOItemLines / WOExpLines / WOHourLines.
Normalized planned journal line produced by delta engine. Later, payload builder maps this into WOItemLines / WOExpLines / WOHourLines.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.DeltaEdgeCaseRules.RequiresReversalDueToFieldChange(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FsaWorkOrderLineSnapshot,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FscmWorkOrderLineAggregation)
member.summary:
Returns true ONLY when one of the 5 “reversal-trigger” fields changed: Department, ProductLine, Warehouse, LineProperty, CalculatedUnitPrice.
Intent-2: Price drift counts ONLY when explicitly supplied by FSA (UnitPriceProvided == true). Mixed FSCM history alone is NOT a reason to reverse.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FsaWorkOrderLineSnapshot
member.summary: Canonical snapshot of the FSA WorkOrder line for delta evaluation. Only includes fields relevant to delta + reversal logic.
Canonical snapshot of the FSA WorkOrder line for delta evaluation. Only includes fields relevant to delta + reversal logic.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FscmDateBucket
member.summary: Represents FSCM journal lines for a WorkOrder line grouped by a specific transaction date (date-only).

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FscmDateBucket.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Decimal,System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.FscmJournalLine})
member.summary: Represents FSCM journal lines for a WorkOrder line grouped by a specific transaction date (date-only).

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FscmJournalAggregator
member.summary: Aggregates FSCM journal lines fetched for a whole WorkOrder into per WorkOrderLine aggregations. The output is consumed by delta calculation and reversal planning.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FscmJournalAggregator.GroupByWorkOrderLine(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.FscmJournalLine})
member.summary:
Groups FSCM journal lines by WorkOrderLineId and produces an aggregation per line.
Dimension grouping rules: - Warehouse is considered ONLY for Item journals. - Warehouse is ignored for Expense / Hour journals.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FscmJournalAggregator.BuildSignature(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.FscmJournalLine,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.JournalType)
member.summary:
Builds a dimension signature string for reversal-triggering attributes.
Warehouse is included ONLY for Item journals.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FscmJournalLineAggExtensions
member.summary: FSCM journal line aggregation extensions.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FscmDimensionBucket
member.summary:
Second-level aggregation bucket for FSCM journal history.
Keyed by reversal-triggering attributes (warehouse excluded): - rpc_department - rpc_productline - msdyn_lineproperty - rpc_calculatedunitprice
This enables deterministic inspection / audit of FSCM history when the above attributes changed.

Second-level aggregation bucket for FSCM journal history.
Keyed by reversal-triggering attributes (warehouse excluded): - rpc_department - rpc_productline - msdyn_lineproperty - rpc_calculatedunitprice
This enables deterministic inspection / audit of FSCM history when the above attributes changed.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FscmReversalProfile
member.summary: Reversal-safe FSCM history profile for a single effective attribute signature. This allows AIS to reverse mixed Bill/NonBill (and similar) history without collapsing it into a single representative line that would leave residual quantities behind.

Reversal-safe FSCM history profile for a single effective attribute signature. This allows AIS to reverse mixed Bill/NonBill (and similar) history without collapsing it into a single representative line that would leave residual quantities behind.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.FscmWorkOrderLineAggregation
member.summary: Aggregated view of FSCM journals for a single WorkOrder line (grouped by WorkOrderLineId).
Aggregated view of FSCM journals for a single WorkOrder line (grouped by WorkOrderLineId).
Backwards-compatible constructor for call sites that haven't been updated yet.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.JournalReversalPlanner
member.summary: Plans reversal journal lines based on existing FSCM journal history for a WorkOrder line. Implements closed/open period splitting rules: - If journals exist in closed period(s), reversal for those quantities must be created as a separate line dated at the 1st day of the current open period. - Remaining open-period journals can be reversed normally (dated "today" or caller-chosen date).

Plans reversals for ALL quantities previously journaled in FSCM for the given WorkOrder line. Caller decides later whether to also add a positive line (e.g., dimension/lineproperty/price change), or only reverse (inactive scenario).
member.param: Aggregated buckets by transaction date (may include null dates).
Period snapshot with open-period start date and closed-period classifier.
Date to use for reversing journals from OPEN period(s) (typically "today").

member.summary: Convenience: plan reversal only for journals that match a predicate (e.g., only old dimension signature), while leaving other history untouched. This is useful if later decide to reverse only "old signature" lines vs entire history. For current spec, FULL reversal is used on any dimension/lineproperty/price change.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.ReversalPlan
member.summary: Result produced by JournalReversalPlanner.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.ReversalPlan.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Decimal,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.PlannedReversal})
member.summary: Result produced by JournalReversalPlanner.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.PlannedReversal
member.summary: Carries planned reversal data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.PlannedReversal.#ctor(System.DateTime,System.Decimal,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Carries planned reversal data.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Delta.ReversalProfilePlanner
member.summary: Plans reversal lines at FSCM signature level so mixed Bill/NonBill history is reversed precisely.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.WoHeaderMappingFields
member.summary: Mapping-only work order header fields fetched from Dataverse and injected into outbound payload. Not used by delta calculation.
Mapping-only work order header fields fetched from Dataverse and injected into outbound payload. Not used by delta calculation.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.FscmEndpointType
member.summary: Represents the FSCM endpoint being invoked. Used to drive endpoint-specific local validation rules.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.FscmJournalLine
member.summary: Normalized FSCM journal line representation used by AIS delta logic. The fetch client maps OData entity sets (Item/Expense/Hour) into this shape.
Normalized FSCM journal line representation used by AIS delta logic. The fetch client maps OData entity sets (Item/Expense/Hour) into this shape.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.FscmReversalPayloadSnapshot
member.summary: FSCM-sourced payload snapshot used to build REVERSAL delta lines. For reversal lines only, AIS must rely on FSCM values (not FSA).
FSCM-sourced payload snapshot used to build REVERSAL delta lines. For reversal lines only, AIS must rely on FSCM values (not FSA).

member.summary: Name/value pair contract used by FSCM custom endpoints. AttributeName must be the FSCM attribute name.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.RunOutcome
member.summary:
Run summary for the accrual orchestration.
WO-payload mode: - WorkOrdersConsidered / WorkOrdersValid / WorkOrdersInvalid are the primary counters.

Run summary for the accrual orchestration.
WO-payload mode: - WorkOrdersConsidered / WorkOrdersValid / WorkOrdersInvalid are the primary counters.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.SubProjectCreateRequest
member.summary: Canonical request model for FSCM SubProject creation. This model represents the inner object of the FSCM contract envelope: { "_request": { ... } }.
Canonical request model for FSCM SubProject creation. This model represents the inner object of the FSCM contract envelope: { "_request": { ... } }.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.SubProjectCreateRequest.WorkOrderId
member.summary: Optional Work Order Id to be sent as 'WorkOrderId' into FSCM contract when present. Used by subproject creation flows that previously overloaded ProjectName with the work order id.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.SubProjectCreateRequest.WorkOrderGuid
member.summary: Optional Work Order GUID (Field Service / Customer Change). Serialized as 'WorkOrderGUID' into FSCM contract when present. Prefer brace format "{GUID}".

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.SubProjectCreateRequest.IsFsaProject
member.summary: Optional FSCM create control flag. Serialized as 'IsFSAProject' when present.

member.name: P:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.SubProjectCreateRequest.ProjectStatus
member.summary: Optional FSCM create control. Serialized as 'ProjectStatus' when present.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.SubProjectCreateResult
member.summary: Carries sub project create result data.

member.summary: Carries sub project create result data.

member.summary: Carries sub project error data.

member.summary: Carries sub project error data.

member.summary: Carries validation result data.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.ValidationResult.#ctor(Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.AccrualStagingRef,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Carries validation result data.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.FilteredWorkOrder
member.summary: A work order JSON object with a resolved journal section key and the journal lines selected for posting.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.FilteredWorkOrder.#ctor(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: A work order JSON object with a resolved journal section key and the journal lines selected for posting.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.ValidationDisposition
member.summary: Indicates how AIS should handle a validation issue.

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.ValidationDisposition.Valid
member.summary: Record is valid and may be posted.

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.ValidationDisposition.Invalid
member.summary: Record is invalid (data/contract issue) and should not be retried.

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.ValidationDisposition.Retryable
member.summary: Record failed validation due to a transient dependency and may be retried.

member.name: F:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.ValidationDisposition.FailFast
member.summary: Validation cannot proceed due to a configuration or system issue; the run should stop.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.WoPayloadValidationDefaults
member.summary: Central place for safe default results for WO payload validation.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.WoPayloadValidationFailure
member.summary: Represents a single record detected during AIS-side validation.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.WoPayloadValidationFailure.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.JournalType,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String,System.String,Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.ValidationDisposition)
member.summary: Represents a single record detected during AIS-side validation.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.Validation.WoPayloadValidationResult
member.summary: Outcome of AIS-side payload validation.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.WorkOrderAttachment
member.summary: A document attachment related to a Work Order in Field Service.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.WorkOrderAttachment.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: A document attachment related to a Work Order in Field Service.

member.name: T:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.WorkOrderStatusUpdateResponse
member.summary: Result of posting a work-order status update to FSCM.

member.name: M:Rpc.AIS.Accrual.Orchestrator.Core.Domain.WorkOrderStatusUpdateResponse.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Result of posting a work-order status update to FSCM.
